description: Initial integrity baseline for AgentDevFlow. Snapshot of artifact state before source/projection separation and integrity infrastructure improvements.

known_findings.description: AGENTS.md references `.opencode/` as canonical path. Will be updated by Issue #596 (source/projection separation).
README.md references `.opencode/commands/agentdev/README.md` as relative link. Will be updated by Issue #597 (docs source/projection update).
50 retired REQ files in docs/requirements/retired/ are preserved for historical reference. Not subject to current requirements.
Rule text for frontmatter validation appears in both REQ-0103 (044, 015) and REQ-0108 (046, 047, 098). Candidate for SSOT consolidation (Issue #599).
Skill references/ vs reference/ canonicalization rules duplicated across REQ-0103 (013, 039) and REQ-0108 (039, 040, 094). Candidate for SSOT consolidation.
No integrity rule catalog exists yet. REQ-0108-150/151 define requirement for 20+ rules with 15+ fields each. To be created by Issue #600.
No REQ impact map exists yet. REQ-0108-152 requires coverage of 10+ active REQs. To be created by Issue #600.
Several REQ entries are stricken through (~~del~~) indicating past reversals. These are retained as historical record per REQ-0101.

REQ-0108 references '.opencode/' paths in scan target definitions (001). After source/projection separation, these paths become runtime projections. Integrity scripts need source scan vs projection scan distinction.
Command/skill/template inventories in command README.md are manually maintained. REQ-0103-059 requires generation-based inventories. To be addressed by Issue #599.

req_internal_consistency.notes: All 14 active REQs have valid frontmatter (id, title, created, updated, tags). No ID collisions between active and retired REQs. REQ index (docs/requirements/README.md) lists all 14 active REQs with correct links.

req_derivative_drift.notes: Key drift areas: (1) source/projection path references pending update (#596/#597), (2) command/skill inventories manually maintained (#599), (3) integrity infrastructure gaps (#600), (4) consumer model undefined (#601). All tracked in Epic #595 child Issues.

source_projection_status.notes: Source/projection separation not yet applied at baseline time. .opencode/ contains both source and runtime. Separation planned in Issue #596 (Wave 1).
